title: I Can Only Imagine
overview: The true story behind MercyMe's beloved song - how a young man's troubled past with his abusive father transforms through faith into the best-selling Christian single of all time.

title: The Shack
overview: After the disappearance of his daughter, a grieving father receives a mysterious invitation to meet with God at a shack in the Oregon wilderness.

title: Overcomer
overview: A basketball coach finds his identity and hope unexpectedly redirected by a cross-country runner who challenges everything he thought he knew about himself.

title: Courageous
overview: Four police officers struggle with their commitment to be good fathers and men of faith after a life-changing tragedy strikes one of their families.

title: Soul Surfer
overview: Based on the true story of Bethany Hamilton, a teen surfer who loses her arm in a shark attack and finds the strength to return to the waves through faith and family.

title: Selma
overview: A chronicle of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s campaign to secure equal voting rights via an epic march from Selma to Montgomery, Alabama in 1965.

title: Marshall
overview: The story of Thurgood Marshall, the first African-American Supreme Court Justice, as he battles through one of his career-defining cases during a time of racial tension.

title: Harriet
overview: The extraordinary tale of Harriet Tubman's escape from slavery and her transformation into one of America's greatest heroes, whose courage saved hundreds of slaves on the Underground Railroad.

title: The Color Purple
overview: A woman faces many hardships in her life, but ultimately finds her power through music, community, and her faith. Based on Alice Walker's Pulitzer Prize-winning novel.

title: Breakthrough
overview: When a 14-year-old boy falls through ice and stops breathing for nearly an hour, his mother's prayers and one doctor's persistence defy all medical explanation.

title: Come Sunday
overview: The true story of Bishop Carlton Pearson, an evangelical pastor in Tulsa whose radical reinterpretation of hell costs him his church and his mentor.

title: When Calls the Heart: The Movie
overview: Elizabeth Thatcher navigates a changing frontier town and the relationships that shape her life, faith, and calling as a teacher.

title: The Best Man: The Final Chapters
overview: Harper and his close-knit group of friends gather for one final reunion, wrestling with their relationships, regrets, and what it means to truly forgive.

title: Dolly Parton's Coat of Many Colors
overview: A young Dolly Parton and her deeply religious Appalachian family face hardship together, held by love and faith and a hand-sewn coat made from rags.

title: Just Mercy
overview: A young lawyer and his struggling nonprofit fight for racial justice and the wrongly condemned in rural Alabama, at great personal cost.

title: Woman King
overview: The story of the Agojie, an all-female unit of warriors who protected the West African kingdom of Dahomey with skills and ferocity unlike anything in the world.

title: Gifted Hands: The Ben Carson Story
overview: The story of Ben Carson, a boy from the inner city who overcomes poverty and a volatile temper to become one of the world's most gifted neurosurgeons.

title: The Letter Writer
overview: An elderly man anonymously writes letters of encouragement to strangers in need, until a teenage girl decides to track down the mysterious author.
